generated_oml:
import "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab" as DTDFVocab
import "http://www.example.org/base" as base
instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification leading to adjustments in robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]
instance AdjustRobotControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustments to robot control algorithms based on friction model identification",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of sensor data and model outputs"
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with steps: problem identification, asset and model analysis, use or creation of calculations or models, data identification ongoing refinement through research collaborations as per [15], continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight
]
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustments in robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustRobotControlAlgorithms
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for motion control",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]
instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

    base:desc "Motor encoder providing real-time sensor data streamed via MQTT"
]
instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder providing real-time sensor data streamed via MQTT"
]
instance MQTTDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
